description: 出国旅行最重要的证件。过安检和值机都需要。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please show me your passport.","zh":"请出示您的护照。"}]

description: 登机牌上有登机口和座位号。手机电子版也可以。
examples_json: [{"en":"Here is your boarding pass. Gate 15.","zh":"这是您的登机牌，15号登机口。"}]

description: 办理登机手续。online check in = 网上值机。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to check in for my flight.","zh":"我要办理值机。"}]

description: 靠窗座位可以看风景。窗 = window
examples_json: 过道 = aisle。
sort_order: [{"en":"Do you prefer a window or aisle seat?","zh":"您喜欢靠窗还是靠走道的座位？"}]

description: 靠走道座位方便起身。上洗手间不用打扰邻座。
examples_json: [{"en":"I prefer an aisle seat.","zh":"我更喜欢靠走道的座位。"}]

description: 随身带上飞机的行李。注意液体限制(100ml)。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can take one carry-on bag.","zh":"您可以带一件随身行李。"}]

description: 放在飞机货舱的行李。超重要付额外费用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your checked baggage limit is 23 kg.","zh":"您的托运行李限额是23公斤。"}]

description: 过安检需取出电子产品、脱外套、解腰带。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please go through the security check.","zh":"请过安检。"}]

description: 安检门，口袋里的金属物品都会响。
examples_json: [{"en":"Walk through the metal detector, please.","zh":"请通过金属探测门。"}]

description: 过安检时需从包里取出单独放一个托盘。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please take your laptop out of the bag.","zh":"请把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来。"}]

description: 登机口号码可能在起飞前变更，注意听广播。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your flight departs from gate 23.","zh":"您的航班从23号登机口出发。"}]

description: 登机时间通常在起飞前30分钟开始。
examples_json: [{"en":"Boarding time is 10:30 AM.","zh":"登机时间是上午10:30。"}]

description: 航班延误的常见原因：天气、机械故障、流量控制。
examples_json: [{"en":"The flight has been delayed by two hours.","zh":"航班延误了两小时。"}]

description: 航班取消可以免费改签或退票。
examples_json: [{"en":"Our flight was cancelled due to bad weather.","zh":"我们的航班因恶劣天气取消了。"}]

description: 入境必问题目。tourism(旅游)/business(商务)/study(学习)。
examples_json: [{"en":"What is the purpose of your visit?","zh":"您来访的目的是什么？"}]

description: 下飞机后第一个通道。持不同签证走不同通道。
examples_json: [{"en":"Go through immigration first, then get your luggage.","zh":"先过入境检查，再取行李。"}]

description: 过了行李提取处后的最后一关。分红色(申报)/绿色(无申报)通道。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have anything to declare at customs?","zh":"您有东西要报关吗？"}]

description: 入境官员可能要求出示回程机票证明你会离开。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have a return ticket?","zh":"您有回程机票吗？"}]

description: 入境时需说明住在哪里。酒店名或朋友地址都行。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'll be staying at the Grand Hotel.","zh":"我将住在大酒店。"}]

description: 提取行李的区域。看大屏幕找对应的行李转盘号。
examples_json: [{"en":"The baggage claim area is downstairs.","zh":"行李提取处在一楼。"}]

description: 行李传送带。找对转盘号很重要。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please wait at carousel 5 for your luggage.","zh":"请在5号转盘等您的行李。"}]

description: 行李没到的话立即去航空公司柜台报 lost luggage。
examples_json: [{"en":"My luggage didn't arrive. I need to report it.","zh":"我的行李没到，我需要报失。"}]

description: 携带超过免税额度的物品需要申报。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have anything to declare?","zh":"有什么需要申报的吗？"}]

description: 免税店通常过安检后可以逛。注意各国免税额度不同。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can buy duty-free items here.","zh":"您可以在这里买免税商品。"}]

description: 各国海关都有禁止携带的物品清单。提前查好避免麻烦。
examples_json: [{"en":"Are there any prohibited items in your luggage?","zh":"您的行李里有违禁品吗？"}]

description: 出租车。英美也常说 cab。ride-share(网约车)如 Uber。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you call a taxi for me?","zh":"能帮我叫辆出租车吗？"}]

description: 出租车费用。meter = 计价器。flat rate = 一口价。
examples_json: [{"en":"What's the estimated fare to the airport?","zh":"去机场大概多少钱？"}]

description: 打车后要收据。报销或投诉都需要。
examples_json: [{"en":"Could I have a receipt, please?","zh":"能给我一张收据吗？"}]

description: 问司机当地有什么好玩的。听当地人的推荐最靠谱。
examples_json: [{"en":"Are you local? I'm visiting for the first time.","zh":"您是本地人吗？我第一次来玩。"}]

description: 让司机推荐餐厅或景点是很好的聊天话题。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you recommend a good place to eat?","zh":"您能推荐一个吃饭的好地方吗？"}]

description: 酒店预订。I have a reservation = 我有预订。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a reservation under the name Maya.","zh":"我用Maya的名字做了预订。"}]

description: 入住酒店需要提供有效的身份证件(ID)。
examples_json: [{"en":"May I see your ID document?","zh":"能看一下您的身份证件吗？"}]

description: 入住酒店通常需要交押金，退房时退还。
examples_json: [{"en":"We need a deposit of 100 dollars.","zh":"我们需要100美元押金。"}]

description: 现在的酒店多用房卡(key card)代替传统钥匙。
examples_json: [{"en":"Here is your room key. Room 302.","zh":"这是您的房卡，302房间。"}]

description: 在房间里点餐送到门口的服务。通常24小时。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I order room service?","zh":"我可以点客房送餐吗？"}]

description: 让前台在指定时间打电话叫醒你。出国必备！
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I have a wake-up call at 6 AM?","zh":"可以早上6点叫醒我吗？"}]

description: 酒店提供的洗衣服务。比外面贵但方便。
examples_json: [{"en":"Does the hotel offer laundry service?","zh":"酒店有洗衣服务吗？"}]

description: 退房。check-out time = 退房时间(通常上午11点)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd like to check out now.","zh":"我现在想退房。"}]

description: 酒店账单。核对额外消费(mini bar等)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Could I have the bill, please?","zh":"请给我账单。"}]

description: 退房后行李可以暂存在酒店。通常免费。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I store my luggage here until 5 PM?","zh":"我可以把行李寄存到下午5点吗？"}]

description: 问路是旅行必备技能。Excuse me
examples_json: which way to...?
sort_order: [{"en":"Could you tell me the direction to the museum?","zh":"能告诉我去博物馆的方向吗？"}]

description: 问路时常见的标志点。at the crossroads = 在十字路口。
examples_json: [{"en":"Turn left at the next crossroads.","zh":"在下一个十字路口左转。"}]

description: 两个路口之间的街道段。go two blocks = 走过两个街区。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's just two blocks from here.","zh":"从这里过去两个街区就到了。"}]
